Chartbook 437 Unseasonal war (2): Europe, gas & yet another February war. Aka, "oops ... we did it again!"  . In a post I did yesterday, I highlighted the way that Israel and America’s attack on Iran is ramifying through markets you might not be thinking about, like fertilizers.
